summary_en: TAY TWO completed acquisition of 1.852 million shares (2.89% of outstanding) for ¥248.2M via ToSTNeT-3 on May 20, 2026, to improve capital efficiency and ensure flexible capital strategy.
title_en: Notice of Results of Acquisition of Treasury Stock via Off-Exchange Transaction (ToSTNeT-3) and Completion of Acquisition
translation_en_brief: TAY TWO CO., LTD. (ticker 7610, TSE Standard) announced on May 20, 2026 the completion of its treasury stock acquisition program. The company purchased 1,852,000 shares of its own common stock representing 2.89% of outstanding shares (excluding treasury stock) for a total of ¥248,168,000 via ToSTNeT-3, an off-exchange transaction method on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The acquisition was conducted on the single date of May 20, 2026, and marked the conclusion of the acquisition program authorized by board resolution from May 19, 2026. The stated purpose was to enhance capital efficiency and maintain strategic flexibility in responding to changing business conditions.
